title: malaxis purpurea
intro: Malaxis purpurea, also known as the purple adder's mouth, is a species of orchid native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Malaxis purpurea include its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Malaxis purpurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
